name: Adhunik Industries Limited
summary: Adhunik Industries Limited manufactures and sells iron and steel products in India. It offers steel related rolled products, such as TMT, wire rods, H. B. wire, etc., as well as provides related services. The company is also involved in the generation of electricity through wind power. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Bhagwati Resources Limited and changed its name to Adhunik Industries Limited in January 2010. Adhunik Industries Limited was incorporated in 1979 and is based in Kolkata, India.
